title: Callbacks of array methods should include return statements
description: In JavaScript, many array methods take a callback function as an argument. These methods are designed to transform or filter arrays based on the logic provided in the callback function. The callback function is called sequentially, and the return value of the callback function is used to determine the return value of the Array method.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Array method callbacks should include return statements when transforming data
